title: Commodore drops Callback flip phone by $100 by defaulting to recycled memory chips and unbundling the earphones Callback 8020 drops to $399 as skyrocketing memory prices punish smartphone buyers
summary: Commodore has lowered the price of its Callback 8020 flip phone to $399, making it more affordable for consumers.
insight: Skyrocketing memory prices force phone manufacturers to cut costs creatively.

title: RAM crisis provokes enthusiast to try Windows 11 on DDR1-era hardware other key vintage components included the Core 2 Q6600 and ATI Radeon HD 4650 AGP
summary: An enthusiast successfully runs Windows 11 on a Core 2 Quad Q6600 processor paired with a DDR1 motherboard and an ATI Radeon HD 4650 AGP graphics card, demonstrating the operating system's capabilities on vintage hardware.
insight: Windows 11's compatibility spans multiple generations of hardware unexpectedly.

title: TP-Link's 8-port 2.5G unmanaged Ethernet switch is a smokin' bargain at $50 upgrade your home network for half price
summary: TP-Link's TL-SG108S-M2 offers 8 2.5 GbE ports at an affordable price of under $50, making it a budget-friendly upgrade for home networks.
insight: Future-proof home networking for under $50, a significant price drop

title: Gigabyte Aero X16 gaming laptop delivers RTX 5060, 32GB RAM, and a 16-inch 165Hz 1600p display for 21% off
summary: The Gigabyte Aero X16 gaming laptop features a Ryzen AI 7 350 CPU, 32GB of RAM, and an RTX 5060, paired with a 16-inch 165Hz 1600p display.
insight: Powerful laptop offers strong specs at an affordable discounted price

title: Save $250 on this AMD AM5 bundle, get Samsung 990 Pro SSD for basically free grab the AMD Ryzen 5 9600X, Gigabyte B850 Aorus Elite motherboard, and 990 Pro 1TB SSD for 36% off
summary: This Newegg bundle offers a discounted price for three PC components, including AMD's Ryzen 5 9600X processor, Gigabyte B850 motherboard, and Samsung 990 Pro 1TB SSD, totaling 36% off the original price.
insight: Significant savings on high-quality PC components for budget-conscious buyers.

title: Sony WH-1000XM5 active noise-canceling headphones for an all-time low $198 at Amazon audiophile-grade audio and ANC for an affordable price
summary: Get audiophile-grade audio and ANC at an affordable price of $198 on Amazon
insight: Exceptional noise-canceling tech meets budget-friendly price point

title: Asus' ROG Zephyrus G16 with an RTX 5070 & 240Hz OLED display is on sale for just $1,575 Save $575 on an excellent gaming laptop with a 16-core flagship CPU & top-tier build quality
summary: Asus' ROG Zephyrus G16 gaming laptop features a 16-core CPU, 16GB RAM, and a 1TB SSD, delivering solid performance and a stunning 240Hz OLED display.
insight: Top-tier gaming performance at a significantly discounted price point.

title: OpenAI's ChatGPT-5.6 gets the same banhammer treatment as Anthropic s Mythos from the federal government source says that Washington cautioned OpenAI against releasing the model without receiving approval
summary: The U.S. government is requesting access to AI models 30 days prior to public release. OpenAI is voluntarily complying with the executive order, but seeks a more sustainable approach for future releases. Washington has cautioned OpenAI against releasing ChatGPT-5.6 without approval.
insight: U.S. government seeks control over powerful AI model releases.

title: Framework's Laptop 13 Pro DIY Edition now costs less than before, but a CPU price hike might be coming Cheaper PCIe 5.0 drives from Adata upgrade customers from 500GB to 1TB for free
summary: Framework's Laptop 13 Pro DIY Edition has become more affordable, while existing customers will receive a free upgrade from 500GB to 1TB PCIe 5.0 SSDs. However, a potential CPU price hike looms, offsetting some of the cost savings. The move is intended to enhance the laptop's value proposition.
insight: Cheaper storage may not offset future CPU price increases

title: Apple will skip its high-end M6 Mac chips and fast-track an AI-focused M7 generation for 2027, report claims may release a base M6 chip for entry-level Macs this year
summary: Apple will release a base M6 chip for entry-level Macs this year, skipping high-end models to fast-track AI-focused M7 chips in 2027.
insight: Accelerated AI chip development prioritizes future innovation over immediate high-performance needs.

title: Solidigm VP talks PCIe 6.0 SSDs, next-gen floating gate NAND, liquid cooled storage and more Avi Shetty, VP of AI, Solutions & Market Enablement discusses the future of enterprise storage tech
summary: Solidigm's VP, Avi Shetty, discusses future enterprise storage technologies, including PCIe 6.0 SSDs, next-gen floating gate NAND, and liquid-cooled storage. He highlights the importance of AI in driving demand for high-capacity, denser storage solutions.
insight: AI fuels demand for denser, high-capacity NAND flash storage

title: AMD Ryzen 7 5800X3D vs Intel Core i7-14700K faceoff A new battle for DDR4 supremacy in 2026
summary: In a showdown between the AMD Ryzen 7 5800X3D and Intel Core i7-14700K, we compared their performance using DDR4 memory in various tasks such as gaming, rendering, encoding, and efficiency. Our tests revealed the strengths and weaknesses of each CPU in 2026. The Ryzen 7 5800X3D's performance is particularly noteworthy given its age.
insight: Legacy DDR4 still offers strong performance with recent CPU releases.

title: AMD's new 10th Anniversary Ryzen 7 5800X3D CPU back in stock Here's where to buy the revamped processor that's the fastest gaming chip available for AM4 platforms [Updated]
summary: AMD's 10th-anniversary Ryzen 7 5800X3D is available for purchase at MSRP at B&H Photo, providing a relief for those who have been searching for the chip after its launch.
insight: Ryzen 7 5800X3D availability ends scalping and price gouging for gamers

title: Microsoft extends free Windows 10 security updates for a second year program now ends on October 12, 2027
summary: Microsoft has extended free Windows 10 security updates for an additional year, with the new cutoff set at October 12, 2027. This extension will provide users with an extra year of critical security patches. The move aims to protect consumers from potential vulnerabilities.
insight: Critical security patches for consumers extended until October 12, 2027

title: GEEKOM A7 2026 Edition Review Part 3: Ubuntu 26.04 on an AMD Ryzen 5 7545U mini PC
summary: The GEEKOM A7 2026 Edition mini PC was reviewed with Ubuntu 26.04 installed on an AMD Ryzen 5 7545U processor. The installation process was smooth and allowed for a dual-boot configuration with Windows 11. Various tests were conducted to evaluate the mini PC's performance and features.
insight: Ubuntu 26.04 performance on the GEEKOM A7 2026 Edition is impressively smooth.

title: GM s cobots enter the age-old factory automation debate
summary: GM's cobots bring a new twist to the debate on factory automation, according to an analyst. The use of cobots, a collaboration between humans and robots, is gaining traction in the industry.
insight: Human-robot collaboration boosts efficiency and productivity in manufacturing processes

title: Which game made you a gamer, and what technology made you a lifelong enthusiast?
summary: A pivotal game or technology sparked a lifelong passion for gaming and tech. This transformative experience often occurred during childhood or adolescence, laying the foundation for a lifelong enthusiasm. Nostalgia and a sense of discovery continue to drive enthusiasts.
insight: Early exposure shapes lifelong tech and gaming interests

title: European Commission moves to designate Amazon and Microsoft as cloud gatekeepers
summary: The European Commission may designate Amazon and Microsoft as cloud gatekeepers, requiring them to comply with additional rules and regulations in the EU to ensure fair competition and protect customers.
insight: Regulating powerful tech giants to prevent market dominance.

title: Bungie cuts nearly 300 jobs as Destiny 2 winds down and Marathon takes center stage
summary: Bungie is cutting nearly 300 jobs as Destiny 2's pipeline winds down, shifting focus to new projects like Marathon.
insight: Industry shift from sustaining large games to developing new IPs.

title: HPE is quietly pivoting from servers to networking, and Cisco should be paying attention
summary: HPE is shifting its focus from servers to networking, a significant change amidst the tech industry's evolution. This move requires adaptation and innovation to stay competitive. As a result, companies like Cisco should take notice.
insight: HPE's pivot to networking poses a challenge to Cisco's dominance.

title: The third Xbox price hike in 15 months raises all models by at least $100
summary: Xbox consoles experience their highest-ever price increase, marking the third hike in 15 months. This comes after mass layoffs at Microsoft-owned game development studios. The price hike affects all Xbox models, raising them by at least $100.
insight: Xbox price hikes signal a struggle to maintain console market share.

title: Ford learned the hard way that AI can't replace experienced engineers
summary: Ford's return to top J.D. Power rankings comes from process changes and the strategic use of AI, drawing a line between automation and human expertise. This shift allows the company to leverage AI while preserving the value of experienced engineers.
insight: AI augmenting human expertise yields better results than AI replacing engineers

title: Polymarket says it will refund users after hackers drained close to $3 million from wallets
summary: Polymarket will refund users affected by a hacking incident. The incident drained close to $3 million from a small number of users' wallets. It occurred on Thursday morning.
insight: Major hack exposes vulnerabilities in prediction market security protocols
